tests.name: test_intraday_ml_system_integration
tests.docstring:
Integration tests for the Intraday ML System focused on pipeline integrity,
performance, stability, and edge case handling.

These tests verify that the complete intraday ML system pipeline works correctly
under various conditions and scenarios, including stress testing and edge cases.

tests.name: test_multi_asset_integration
tests.docstring:
Integration tests for multi-asset class support.

This module contains tests that verify the system can handle multiple asset classes
and properly integrate them with the core strategy components.

tests.name: test_strategy_execution
tests.docstring:
Integration tests for the strategy execution flow.

This module contains tests for the integration between data processing,
spread analysis, signal generation, and strategy components.

tests.docstring:
Integration tests for Interactive Brokers TWS connectivity.

This module contains integration tests for the IBConnector class and 
various asset classes interacting with a real TWS instance.

NOTE: These tests require a running TWS instance on localhost:7497

tests.name: test_intraday_ml_integration
tests.docstring:
Integration test for the intraday ML system.

This test verifies that all components of the intraday ML system work together correctly,
from data loading to signal generation with ML enhancements and regime-aware parameters.

tests.name: test_data_flow
tests.docstring:
Integration tests for the data flow between components.

This module contains tests for the data flow between data processor,
pair finder, spread analyzer, and signal generator components.

codebase_review.name: codebase_analyzer
codebase_review.docstring:
Codebase Analyzer

This script analyzes the quant-trader codebase and generates reports about
its structure, components, and relationships.

examples.name: run_ml_integrated_intraday
examples.docstring:
Example script demonstrating the integrated ML system for intraday trading.

This script shows how to:
1. Set up the integrated ML system
2. Connect ML models to signal generation
3. Integrate regime detection with parameter adaptation
4. Run ML-enhanced backtests
5. Generate intraday trading plans

examples.name: run_enhanced_intraday_backtest
examples.docstring:
Example script demonstrating how to use the IntradayBacktestEngine with performance visualization.

This script shows how to:
1. Set up an intraday backtest with realistic constraints
2. Run the backtest with transaction cost modeling
3. Visualize the results with detailed performance analysis
4. Incorporate market regime information into the analysis

examples.name: use_strategy_variants
examples.docstring:
Example script demonstrating how to use the different strategy variants.

This script shows how to initialize and use the various strategy variants,
including the base pairs trading strategy, time-series based strategy,
and machine learning signal generation strategy.

scripts.name: generate_test_data
scripts.docstring:
Test data generation script for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This script generates synthetic data for testing purposes, creating cointegrated
pairs with controlled properties to help users test the system without real data.

src.name: __init__
src.docstring:
Quant Trader package initialization.

This initializes the main package for the quant trading system.

src.docstring:
Main module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

different components based on the configuration settings.

connectors.docstring:
Fixed version of the Interactive Brokers (IB) Connector for testing.

that was causing issues.

connectors.docstring:

market data retrieval, order execution, and account management using the

connectors.docstring:
Interactive Brokers (IB) Connector Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

order execution, and account management using the ib_insync library.

Utility functions for working with Interactive Brokers (IB) contracts.

This module provides helper functions for converting between IB contract
objects and symbol strings, and other utility functions for working with

Cryptocurrency Asset Classes Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

Fixed Income Asset Classes Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

reporting.name: metrics
reporting.docstring:
Performance Metrics for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides functions for calculating performance metrics
from backtest results, including returns, drawdowns, risk-adjusted metrics,
and trade statistics.

reporting.name: __init__
reporting.docstring:
Reporting Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides tools for generating comprehensive HTML reports
of backtest results with visualizations and performance metrics.

reporting.name: example
reporting.docstring:
Example usage of the reporting module for generating backtest reports.

This script demonstrates how to use the reporting module to generate
comprehensive HTML reports from backtest results.

reporting.name: report_generator
reporting.docstring:
Backtest Report Generator for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides a BacktestReportGenerator class that creates comprehensive
HTML reports from backtest results with interactive visualizations and metrics.

live_trading.name: example_with_position_tracking
live_trading.docstring:
Example script for using the LiveTrader with PositionTracker.

This script demonstrates how to configure and use the LiveTrader class
with the PositionTracker for position management, P&L calculation, and
trade tracking.

IMPORTANT: This script will connect to your Interactive Brokers account
and could potentially place real orders that involve real money. Use with caution
and only after thorough testing in a paper trading environment.

live_trading.name: example_with_monitoring
live_trading.docstring:
Example script for using the LiveTrader with TradingMonitor.

This script demonstrates how to configure and use the LiveTrader class
with the TradingMonitor for monitoring, alerts, and performance tracking.

IMPORTANT: This script will connect to your Interactive Brokers account
and could potentially place real orders that involve real money. Use with caution
and only after thorough testing in a paper trading environment.

live_trading.name: monitoring
live_trading.docstring:
Monitoring module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides monitoring, alerting, and health tracking functionality
for the live trading environment.

live_trading.name: __init__
live_trading.docstring:
Live Trading Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides live trading capabilities for executing strategies
with real market data and actual order execution through Interactive Brokers.

live_trading.name: example
live_trading.docstring:
Example script for using the LiveTrader with Interactive Brokers.

This script demonstrates how to configure and use the LiveTrader class
for executing trades with real money through the Interactive Brokers API.

IMPORTANT: This script will connect to your Interactive Brokers account
and could potentially place real orders that involve real money. Use with caution
and only after thorough testing in a paper trading environment.

live_trading.name: live_trader
live_trading.docstring:
Live Trader for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides a live trading environment that connects to Interactive Brokers
for real market data and actual order execution.

live_trading.name: position_tracker
live_trading.docstring:
Position Tracking module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides functionality for tracking and managing positions
in the live trading environment, including P&L calculation, position
lifecycle management, and reporting.

strategies.name: __init__
strategies.docstring:
Strategies module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides various trading strategies for the system.

strategies.name: multi_pair_portfolio
strategies.docstring:
Multi-Pair Portfolio Strategy Implementation for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module implements a portfolio approach for managing multiple pairs simultaneously
with advanced risk management and allocation techniques.

strategies.name: base
strategies.docstring:
Base Strategy class for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module defines the base Strategy interface that all strategies must implement.

optimization.name: adaptive_parameter_manager
optimization.docstring:
Adaptive Parameter Manager Module

This module provides functionality to manage and apply regime-specific parameters
for intraday trading based on detected market regimes.

optimization.name: __init__
optimization.docstring:
Parameter Optimization Framework for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides tools for optimizing the parameters of the pairs trading strategy:
- Grid Search: Exhaustive search over specified parameter values
- Genetic Algorithm: Evolutionary approach for parameter optimization
- Walk-Forward Testing: Testing strategy using rolling windows
- Intraday Parameter Optimization: Regime-specific parameter optimization for intraday trading
- Adaptive Parameter Management: Dynamic parameter adjustment based on market regimes

optimization.name: intraday_parameter_optimizer
optimization.docstring:
Intraday Parameter Optimizer Module

This module extends the grid search optimizer to create regime-specific 
parameter sets for intraday trading strategies.

optimization.name: parameter_space
optimization.docstring:
Parameter Space definitions for optimization.

This module defines the parameter spaces for various optimization techniques.

optimization.name: __init__
optimization.docstring:
Genetic Algorithm optimization for pairs trading strategy parameters.

This module provides tools for evolutionary optimization of parameters.

optimization.name: genetic_algorithm
optimization.docstring:
Genetic Algorithm Optimization for Pairs Trading Strategy.

This module implements a genetic algorithm optimizer for finding optimal parameters
for the pairs trading strategy through evolutionary methods.

optimization.name: __init__
optimization.docstring:
Grid Search optimization for pairs trading strategy parameters.

This module provides tools for exhaustive search over specified parameter values.

optimization.name: grid_search
optimization.docstring:
Grid Search Optimization for Pairs Trading Strategy.

This module implements a grid search optimizer for finding optimal parameters
for the pairs trading strategy.

optimization.name: __init__
optimization.docstring:
Walk-Forward Testing framework for pairs trading strategy.

This module provides tools for testing strategies using rolling windows to simulate 
real-world trading where parameters are periodically re-optimized.

optimization.name: walk_forward
optimization.docstring:
Walk-Forward Testing Framework for Pairs Trading Strategy.

This module implements a walk-forward testing framework that trains on historical
windows and tests on out-of-sample periods to validate strategy robustness.

strategy_variants.docstring:
Machine Learning Signal Generation Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module implements machine learning-based approaches to signal generation

strategy_variants.name: time_series_strategy
strategy_variants.docstring:
Time Series Strategy Implementation for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module implements a time-series based approach to pairs trading,

strategy_variants.docstring:
Time Series Strategy Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

Visualization module for intraday backtest performance analysis.

with a focus on time-of-day patterns, transaction costs, and regime-aware
performance attribution.

backtest.docstring: Backtesting module for simulating and evaluating trading strategies.

Intraday backtesting engine with realistic constraints and transaction cost modeling.

including time-of-day constraints, realistic transaction costs, and execution modeling.

paper_trading.docstring:
Paper Trading Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

Paper Trader for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

1. Connect to IB for market data
2. Set up a paper trading environment
3. Place orders and track positions
4. Print account and position updates

Intraday ML-Enhanced Paper Trader

This module extends the base PaperTrader with ML capabilities, real-time

data_processor.docstring:

Pair Trading module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

Pair finder module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module implements pair finding functionality to identify cointegrated pairs.

ml_enhancements.name: ensemble_models
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Ensemble Models Module

This module provides ensemble learning techniques to improve model performance
through combining multiple models using stacking, boosting, and bagging methods.

ml_enhancements.name: model_retraining
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Automated Model Retraining Module

This module provides functionality for automated retraining of machine learning models
for intraday trading when new data becomes available or model performance degrades.

ml_enhancements.name: intraday_model_trainer
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Intraday Model Trainer Module

This module provides functionality for training and managing machine learning models
specifically for intraday trading signals.

ml_enhancements.name: __init__
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Machine Learning Enhancements for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides machine learning-based tools to enhance the pairs trading strategy:
- Spread Prediction: ML models to predict future spread movements
- Regime Detection: Detect breakdowns in cointegration relationships
- Feature Engineering: Create advanced features for improved signal generation

ml_enhancements.name: intraday_integration
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Intraday ML Integration Module

This module integrates various ML components for intraday trading:
1. Connects ML models to signal generation
2. Integrates regime detection with parameter adaptation
3. Links the backtesting system with ML enhancements

ml_enhancements.name: training_utils
ml_enhancements.docstring:
ML Training Utilities Module

This module provides utilities for training machine learning models for intraday trading,
including walk-forward validation and label generation functions.

ml_enhancements.name: intraday_signals
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Intraday Signal Enhancement Module

This module provides ML-based signal enhancements for intraday pairs trading,
focusing on improving entry/exit timing, filtering false signals, and adapting
to changing market conditions within the trading session.

ml_enhancements.name: data_augmentation
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Time Series Data Augmentation Module

This module provides data augmentation techniques for time series financial data
to improve model generalization and robustness.

ml_enhancements.name: __init__
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Spread Prediction Models for Pairs Trading.

This module provides machine learning models to predict future spread movements.

ml_enhancements.name: spread_predictor
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Spread Predictor for Pairs Trading.

This module provides a SpreadPredictor class for predicting future spread movements
using various machine learning models.

ml_enhancements.name: model_factory
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Model Factory for Spread Prediction.

This module provides functions to create various types of machine learning models
for predicting spread movements.

ml_enhancements.name: regime_detector
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Regime Detector for Pairs Trading.

This module provides tools to detect breakdowns in spread relationships
and regime shifts in the spread behavior.

ml_enhancements.name: __init__
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Regime Detection for Pairs Trading.

This module provides tools to detect breakdowns in cointegration relationships
and regime shifts in the spread behavior.

ml_enhancements.name: market_regime_classifier
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Market Regime Classifier Module

This module provides functionality to detect market regimes using various
statistical and machine learning methods to adapt trading parameters dynamically.

ml_enhancements.name: intraday_features
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Intraday Feature Engineering Module

This module provides specialized feature engineering for intraday trading,
focusing on time-of-day patterns, volatility profiles, and liquidity metrics.

ml_enhancements.name: advanced_features
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Advanced Feature Engineering Module

This module extends the base intraday feature engineering with more sophisticated 
features including:
- Advanced technical indicators
- Cross-asset interaction features
- Nonlinear transformations
- Temporal pattern detection

ml_enhancements.name: feature_generator
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Feature Generator for Pairs Trading.

This module provides tools to create advanced features for pairs trading strategies.

ml_enhancements.name: __init__
ml_enhancements.docstring:

spread_analytics.name: spread_analyzer

performance.name: __init__
performance.docstring:
Performance Enhancement Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides tools to improve the performance of the system:
- Parallel processing: Execute tasks in parallel for faster computation
- Caching: Cache frequently used data to avoid redundant calculations
- Efficient data structures: Optimize memory usage and processing speed

performance.name: sparse_time_series
performance.docstring:
Sparse Time Series Data Structure for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides a memory-efficient sparse time series implementation,
optimized for financial time series with missing values or irregular intervals.

performance.name: compressed_ohlc
performance.docstring:
Compressed OHLC Data Structure for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides a memory-efficient compressed OHLC (Open, High, Low, Close)
data structure for storing and processing financial time series data.

performance.name: __init__
performance.docstring:
Efficient Data Structures for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides optimized data structures for efficient storage and processing,
reducing memory usage and improving computational performance.

performance.name: rolling_window
performance.docstring:
Rolling Window Data Structures for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides efficient rolling window implementations for time series analysis,
optimized for performance and memory usage.

performance.name: task_pool
performance.docstring:
Task Pool for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides a task pool for managing long-running parallel tasks
with automatic resource management and task prioritization.

performance.name: __init__
performance.docstring:
Parallel Processing Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides tools for executing tasks in parallel to speed up computation.

performance.name: parallel_executor
performance.docstring:
Parallel Executor for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides classes and functions for executing tasks in parallel
using process-based or thread-based parallelism.

performance.name: function_cache
performance.docstring:
Function Caching for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides decorators for caching function results to improve performance.

performance.name: __init__
performance.docstring:
Caching Module for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides caching mechanisms to avoid redundant calculations
and improve performance by reusing frequently accessed data.

performance.name: data_cache
performance.docstring:
Data Cache for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.

This module provides a data cache for storing and retrieving frequently used data,
with support for expiration, persistence, and memory management.
